calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-16-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Braccini (by CourtCall) and Paul Matiasic for petitioner Marcia Kirk.

Mr. Matiasic advised the Court that there was no objection to the tentative ruling, and asked if the Court would sign the proposed order. The Court asked if the other counsel in the matter had agreed to the form of the order. Mr. Braccini replied that he had served the proposed order to Ms. Hess on March 1st and requested a response, but had not received a response. He added that he had again emailed the proposed order to Ms. Hess yesterday around 11:00 am and again received no response. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart; Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Investigator: Cynthia Webb-Beckford/Naomi Brandes. Bailiff: Deputy . (Not reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-08-2017 Continued To Mar-01-17 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Braccini for Marcia Kirk.
Stephanie Hess for Patricia McMillan.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to whether Ms. McMillan and the named Successor Administrator have waived their right to serve, whether the one year statute of limitations has ended, whether or not probate is necessary to address the Creditor's Claim, whether a creditor's claim needs to be filed to move forward against the Trust, who the defendant is (the Trust, the Estate or both), etc. The petition for letters of Administration is continued to March 1, 2017 at 2:00 p.m., in Dept. 204. Briefs are do by February 22, 2017.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-25-2017 Continued To Feb-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
